patches.note: Incremental patch for a PAK that already contains the earlier real-P2 profile and PLAY-switch fix: move the dispatch target by the corrected additional 54-byte callback insertion.
Construct the existing native callback name UpdateCharacterTypes and invoke it with zero character arguments, matching the original game call shape, before initLevelTransition.
Correct the PLAY lookupswitch case after the additional 54-byte insertion: offset changes from -213 to -267.
